heading: Statistical Abstract of the United States
label: 1343 Statistical Abstract of the United States
text: In addition to the usual number of the Statistical Abstract of the United States, twelve thousand copies shall be printed: three thousand for the Senate, six thousand for the House of Representatives, and three thousand for distribution by the Secretary of Commerce.
